title: AI Agent node crashes with 'connection lost' error
symptom: The AI Agent node crashes with a 'connection lost' error when attempting to process images. This occurs when the images are too large for the node to handle.
not_this_if: Images are small enough to be processed without issues
root_cause: The AI Agent node has limitations on the size of the images it can process. When images exceed this size, it can lead to crashes and connection issues.
fix_steps: Reduce the size of the images being processed
Use a resize node to ensure images are within acceptable limits
Test with a smaller number of images to confirm stability
agent_instruction: Resize images before passing them to the AI Agent node to prevent crashes.
